channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: How the world failed a mother’s children, killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza
item.description: How the world failed a mother’s children, killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza

item.title: Thousands protest in Albania over Kushner-linked resort project
item.description: Thousands protest in Albania over Kushner-linked resort project.

item.title: US visa rejections, war on Iran keep fans away from World Cup
item.description: High visa application fees, equally high rejection rates, an unwelcoming America, and the war combine to deter fans.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 talking points: NFL-style half-time show, kits and more
item.description: Al Jazeera breaks down the key talking points ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 which kicks off next week.

item.title: Iran beat Mali in final warm-up before heading to World Cup
item.description: Iran beat Mali in their final competitive match before departing for their Mexico base for the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: US raises pressure on Cuba as it sanctions President Diaz-Canel
item.description: Measures come as Cuba continues to experience food shortages and blackouts.

item.title: Sooryavanshi in line for T20 call as India fast-track 15-year-old to top
item.description: Following his run topping display at the IPL, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is being lined up as India's youngest player.

item.title: Putin says ‘too early’ to talk about staying in power until 2036
item.description: Putin says ‘too early’ to talk about staying in power until 2036.

item.title: French-Iranian Persepolis author Marjane Satrapi dies of ‘sadness’
item.description: Satrapi's autobiographical novel was born from her experiences of Iran's Islamic revolution and war with Iraq.

item.title: Fireball seen after explosion at Mexico gas facility
item.description: Fireball seen after explosion at Mexico gas facility

item.title: UN envoys call on Trump to stop Israeli annexation
item.description: UN envoys call on Trump to stop Israeli annexation

item.title: China’s Xi headed to North Korea in bid to shore up ties
item.description: The Chinese leader's visit on June 8-9, his first in seven years, comes as Pyongyang strengthens relations with Russia.

item.title: Kushner Island? Why a planned resort has provoked protests in Albania
item.description: Government hopes the project can boost Albania as a global tourism destination - but environmental concerns are rife.

item.title: ‘We are fighters’: Iraq aim to shock rivals at 2026 World Cup
item.description: Coach Graham Arnold and two key players speak to Al Jazeera ahead of Iraq's first World Cup appearance since 1986.

item.title: Iran war day 98: Tehran raises doubts on deal as Lebanon fighting continues
item.description: Israel strikes Lebanon despite ceasefire, while Hezbollah rejects deal as death toll tops 3,500.

item.title: Pakistan’s Lyari defies Bollywood’s gangland label to rise as boxing haven
item.description: Food, football and history mingle in Karachi's oldest settlement. And a boxing coach teaches girls to defy stereotypes.

item.title: Why Mogadishu clashes are deepening Somalia’s political crisis again
item.description: Tensions over Somali elections escalate into violence, leaving Mogadishu residents grappling with fear and disruption.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel continues strikes, forced displacement in Lebanon
item.description: Israel has ordered the displacement of at least nine Lebanese towns, killed at least six in south area today.

item.title: Democrat fails to block US measure to deepen Israel military cooperation
item.description: Congressman Ro Khanna says the integration push only boosts Netanyahu, but his push to revoke the measure fell short.

item.title: Ivory Coast beats France in World Cup warning to one of the favourites
item.description: Ivory Coast defeats France 2-1 in friendly ahead of the 2026 World Cup, as Manchester United's Amad Diallo seals win.

item.title: Democrats force vote on Trump’s $1.8bn settlement fund in ‘vote-a-rama’
item.description: Republicans seek to pass $70bn immigration-enforcement funding, but must endure series of votes on controversial issues.

item.title: Kenyan president defends US Ebola facility amid deadly protests
item.description: Kenyan President William Ruto said allowing the US to build an Ebola quarantine facility in Kenya was the “right thing”.

item.title: Why is the US so invested in Colombia’s election?
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Hala Al Shami explains why US officials are invested in Colombia's presidential elections.

item.title: Lebanon latest: Hezbollah rejects US plan as Israel continues attacks
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Obaida Hitto has the latest from Lebanon where a new diplomatic push has done little to quell violence.

item.title: Hezbollah rejects US-brokered ceasefire deal between Israel and Lebanon
item.description: Hezbollah has condemned a US-brokered ceasefire framework accepted by Israel and Lebanon
